response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their experience is primarily in JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, and they show no track record in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning ambiguous cloud architecture projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects like GISCollective and developer tooling
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role) — far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale distributed systems design
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering mentorship
